investigation_summary: $62M SEC settlement (2021) — cookie-jar procurement accounting; restatements. $15.4B post-merger impairment. 3G zero-based budgeting: mass layoffs (~13k year one), quality/R&D squeeze per analysts. Portfolio ultra-processed (Lunchables, Oscar Mayer, Velveeta).

profile.parent: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ: KHC) — 3G & Berkshire
profile.legal_summary: SEC accounting fraud; brand writedowns; recalls (listeria, labeling).
profile.labor_summary: 3G-driven layoffs & plant closures; salaried manager overwork reports.
profile.environmental_summary: UPF supply chain footprint; not CDP headline in seed.
profile.product_health: Processed meat (WHO G1); artificial colors in kids products; Lunchables sodium.
profile.executive_summary: 3G / Buffett governance story dominates financial press.
